---
title: "Events"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "Browse all our events"
description: "Browse upcoming and past chen.ist Academy events including hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs."
listing:
  contents: "pages/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, location, category]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Events</span></h1>
    <p>Browse all our events</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="alert alert-success mt-4 mb-4" role="alert">
      <h4 class="alert-heading"><i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i> New Event Added!</h4>
      <p>Check out our <a href="pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="alert-link">AI Ethics Hackathon</a> on July 20-21, 2025 - a weekend focusing on ethical AI development and responsible technology.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

## Event Categories

- **Hackathons**: Intense problem-solving events focused on collaboration and innovation
- **Workshops**: Hands-on learning sessions with expert guidance
- **Conferences**: Industry gatherings featuring keynotes, panels, and networking
- **Summer School**: Intensive multi-week educational programs
- **Meetups**: Informal community gatherings focused on specific topics

Our events are designed to foster learning, connection, and professional development within the tech community. Each event page provides detailed information about the agenda, speakers, venue, and registration process.

Want to suggest an event or collaborate as a partner? [Contact us](https://cal.com/chenist) with your ideas.
